messages.content:
Translate to Silesian Polish

"My dog is sleeping"
"He has the patience of a saint."
"Vinny gramy w gůrńik." (assuming "video game" refers to the popular game "Minecraft" which is commonly called "gůrńik" in Silesian Polish)
"The Dawn of Everything. A New History of Mankind"

Translate to Romance Polish (literally just Polish but with Latin grammar rules)

"He has the patience of a saint."

"Elle a pacientem santorom." (Note: this is not exactly how Romance Polish would be written, as it would adapt to the context and gender, but this is a direct translation that follows Latin grammar rules)

Translate to Venedic

"Republic of the Two Kingdoms"
